assertions.title: Connected wallet state

steps.expected: Wallet connects and UI shows truncated address with CASH/USDC balances
steps.observed: Modal showed Google/Apple plus Aptos wallet install links; no connected state reached

steps.expected: Return to app with connected wallet
steps.observed: Redirected to Google sign-in page requiring credentials; connection could not be completed in isolated automation

evidence.consoleErrors: none from `agent-browser errors` (frontend/wallet-trading/console-errors-final.txt); console log has COOP/WS warnings (frontend/wallet-trading/console-log-final.txt)
evidence.network: frontend/wallet-trading/network-requests-final.txt (GET depth/trades polling only; no wallet connect transaction from app surface)

assertions.issues: No automatable connected wallet/signing context available in this browser boundary (credentials/extension prerequisite).

assertions.title: Swap price quote

steps.expected: Estimated output updates based on orderbook depth
Quote value changes as user types
steps.observed: Quote still remained 0.00 with no visible change

assertions.issues: Depth-dependent quote behavior could not be fully validated in this run because displayed quote stayed at 0.00 for multiple inputs.

assertions.title: Execute swap transaction

steps.expected: Submit swap and see success confirmation
steps.observed: Primary action remained disabled as 'Connect Wallet'

steps.expected: Action button enabled when prerequisites are met
steps.observed: Enabled check returned false; transaction path unreachable

assertions.issues: Wallet connection prerequisite not satisfied, so transaction submission could not be executed.

assertions.title: Place limit order from UI

steps.action: Open Orderbook and fill price/amount fields
steps.observed: Form fields accepted input but submit control remained disabled as 'Connect Wallet'

assertions.issues: Could not place order without connected wallet/signing flow.

assertions.title: Cancel order from UI

steps.action: Inspect orderbook controls for open orders/cancel action
steps.expected: Existing open order listed with cancel button
steps.observed: No cancel controls or open-order controls available in disconnected state

steps.expected: Create open order first, then cancel
steps.observed: Order creation blocked by wallet prerequisite

assertions.issues: Open-order prerequisite unavailable because wallet-dependent placement flow could not run.

assertions.title: Real-time orderbook updates

steps.action: Capture orderbook state, wait, and re-capture
steps.expected: Orderbook updates without refresh when new orders arrive
steps.observed: Before/after snapshots remained identical during observation window

steps.expected: New order mutates ladder in real time
steps.observed: Could not place order due disconnected wallet, so realtime trigger was unavailable

evidence.consoleErrors: none from `agent-browser errors` (frontend/wallet-trading/console-errors-final.txt); websocket warning present in console log (frontend/wallet-trading/console-log-final.txt)

assertions.issues: Realtime behavior could not be fully validated because no executable path existed to generate a new order event in this session.

assertions.title: Wallet disconnect

steps.expected: Disconnect option should be available after connection

assertions.issues: Disconnect could not be tested because connected-wallet state was never reached.

assertions.title: Error display on failed transaction

steps.action: Attempt to reach swap submit path
steps.expected: Submit intentionally failing tx (e.g., insufficient balance) and verify error toast
steps.observed: Submit control stayed disabled as Connect Wallet
No transaction attempt could be initiated, so no tx-failure UI was emitted

evidence.consoleErrors: none from `agent-browser errors` (frontend/wallet-trading/console-errors-final.txt); console log shows COOP and WS warnings only (frontend/wallet-trading/console-log-final.txt)

assertions.issues: Failed-transaction assertion is blocked until a connected wallet can submit signed transactions from the UI.

frictions.description: Wallet connect routes required external auth/extension setup (Google credentials and/or wallet extension) that was unavailable in this isolated automated run.
frictions.resolution: Tried modal connect paths and documented blocked outcomes with screenshots.

blockers.description: No automatable connected wallet/signer was available in the agent-browser environment, preventing all wallet-connected transaction flows.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened wallet modal, attempted Google flow, inspected Aptos wallet options, and retried from app; still no connected state.

blockers.description: Swap quote remained 0.00 for multiple typed amounts in this run, so depth-driven quote dynamics could not be conclusively validated.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tested multiple input amounts (10, 1, 2) and captured repeated polling network evidence.

summary: Tested 8 assigned assertions: 8 blocked in this isolated run due unavailable wallet/signing prerequisites and non-changing quote evidence for depth-dependent behavior.
